Generate utterance ID if not provided\n404\t    if not utterance_id:\n405\t        utterance_id = str(uuid.uuid4())\n406\t\n407\t    # Create utterance record\n408\t    await store.create_utterance(session_id, utterance, utterance_id)\n409\t\n410\t    # \"\"\"\n461\t    utterance = request.get(\"utterance\", \"\")\n462\t    utterance_id = request.get(\"utterance_id\")\n463\t    session_id = request.get(\"session_id\")\n464\t    surface_id = in store\n492\t            classification = routed_intent.classification\n493\t            await store.create_intent(\n494\t                utterance_id=utterance_id,\n495\t                session_id=session_id,\n496\t                project_slug=classification.project_slug,\n497\t                intent_type=classification.intent_type.value,\n498\t            )\n499\t            intent_ids.append(routed_intent.intent_id)\n500\t\n501\t            # Create task for parallel processing\n502\t            task = asyncio.create_task(\n503\t                router.process_intent(routed_intent),\n504\t                name=f\"process_{routed_intent.intent_id[:8]}\"\n505\t            )\n506\t            intent_tasks.append((routed_intent.intent_id, SSE.\"\"\"\n511\t            results = []\n512\t\n513\t            for intent_id, task in intent_tasks:\n514\t                try:\n515\t                    result = await task\n516\t                    results.append(result)\n517\t\n518\t                    # Broadcast result_created so canvas reloads topics\n519\t                    if _broadcaster and surface_id:\n520\t                        await _broadcaster.broadcast(\n521\t                            SSEEvent(\n522\t                                event_type=\"result_created\",\n523\t                        }\n530\t                            )\n531\t                        )\n532\t\n533\t                except Exception as e:\n534\t                    logger.error(f\"Intent        \"error\": str(e),\n539\t                    })\n540\t\n541\t            return results\n542\t\n543\t        # Start parallel processing in background\n544\t        asyncio.create_task(stream_results())\n545\t\n546\t        # Return acknowledgment immediately\n547\t        return {\n548\t            \"utterance_id\": utterance_id,\n549\t }\n677\t\n678\t\n679\t@app.get(\"/events\")\n680\tasync def canvas_sse(\n681\t    session_id: str,\n682\t    surface_id: str | None = None,\n683\t):\n684\t    \"\"\"\n685\t    Server-Sent Events endpoint for canvas connections.\n686\t\n687\t    Provides real-time updates for:\n688\t    - Topic changes\n689\t    - New results\n690\t    - Intent status updates\n691\t    - Workload summaries\n692\t\n693\t    Sends workload summary on connect for reconnection support.\n694\t    \"\"\"\n695\t    broadcaster = get_broadcaster()\n696\t\n697\t    # Get or create session\n698\t    store = await get_store()\n699\t    session = await store.get_session(session_id)\n700\t    if not session:\n701\t        session_id = await store.create_session()\n702\t        logger.info(f\"Created new session: {session_id}\")\n703\t\n704\t    # Register or update surface\n705\t    if not surface_id:\n706\t        surface_id = await store.register_surface(session_id, \"canvas\")\n707\t connect\n719\t    summary = await store.get_workload_summary(session_id)\n720\t\n721\t    async def event_stream():\n722\t        try:\n723\t            # Send initial connection event with workload summary\n724\t            yield broadcaster._format_sse(\"connected\", {\n725\t                \"surface_id\": surface_id,\n726\t                \"session_id\": session_id,\n727\t            })\n728\t\n729\t            yield broadcaster._format_sse(\"workload_summary\", summary)\n730\t\n731\t            # Send initial topic cards\n732\t            if _topic_manager:\n733\t                cards = await _topic_manager.get_active_topic_cards(session_id)\n734\t                yield broadcaster._format_sse(\"topic_cards\", {\n735\t                    \"cards\": [card.to_dict() for card in cards]\n736\t                })\n737\t\n738\t            # Stream events\n739\t            async for event_data in broadcaster.event_generator(connection):\n740\t                yield event_data\n741\t\n742\t        except asyncio.CancelledError:\n743\t            logger.info(f\"SSE stream cancelled for surface {surface_id}\")\n744\t            raise\n745\t\n746\t    return StreamingResponse(\n747\t        event_stream(),\n748\t        media_type=\"text/event-stream\",\n749\t        headers={\n750\t            \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache\",\n751\t            \"Connection\": \"keep-alive\",\n752\t            \"X-Accel-Buffering\": \"no\",  # Disable nginx buffering\n753\t        },\n754\t    )\n755\t\n756\t\n757\t@app.post(\"/heartbeat\")\n758\tasync def idle.\n763\t    \"\"\"\n764\t    session_id = request.get(\"session_id\")\n765\t    surface_id = request.get(\"surface_id\")\n766\t\n767\t    if not session_id or not surface_id:\n768\t        return  Get active topic cards for a session.\n783\t\n784\t    Returns topics with staleness info for canvas rendering.\n785\t    \"\"\"\n786\t    if not _topic_manager:\n787\t        return         )\n\n                except Exception as e:\n                    logger.error(f\"Intent processing failed: {e}\")\n                    results.append({\n                        \"intent_id\": })\n\n            # Stream events\n            async for event_data in broadcaster.event_generator(connection):\n                yield event_data\n\n        except asyncio.CancelledError:\n            logger.info(f\"SSE stream cancelled for surface {surface_id}\")\n            raise\n\n    return StreamingResponse(\n        event_stream(),\n        media_type=\"text/event-stream\",\n        headers={\n            \"Cache-Control\": \"no-cache\",\n            \"Connection\": \"keep-alive\",\n            \"X-Accel-Buffering\": \"no\",  # Disable nginx buffering\n        },\n    )\n\n\n@app.post(\"/heartbeat\")\nasync def heartbeat(request: dict):\n    \"\"\"\n    Heartbeat endpoint for canvas to update surface last_seen.\n\n    Called periodically by the canvas to prevent get_store()\n\n    # Get or create session\n    session = await store.get_session(request.session_id)\n    if not session:\n        session_id = await store.create_session()\n session_id: str,\n    surface_id: Optional[str] = None,\n    surface_type: str = \"canvas\"\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Server-Sent Events endpoint for canvas connections.\n\n    Provides real-time updates for topics, results, and component updates.\n    \"\"\"\n    broadcaster = get_broadcaster()\n\n    # Get or create session\n    store = await get_store()\n    session = await store.get_session(session_id)\n    if not session:\n        session_id = await store.create_session()\n        logger.info(f\"Created new session: {session_id}\")\n\n    # Register or update surface\n    if not surface_id:\n        surface_id = await store.register_surface(session_id, surface_type)\n        logger.info(f\"Registered {surface_type} surface: {surface_id}\")\n    else:\n        await store.update_surface_heartbeat(surface_id)\n\n    # Create SSE connection\n    connection = broadcaster.register(\n        surface_id=surface_id,\n        session_id=session_id,\n        surface_type=surface_type,\n    )\n\n    # Send workload summary on connect\n    summary = await store.get_workload_summary(session_id)\n\n    async def event_stream():\n        try:\n            #           yield broadcaster._format_sse(\"workload_summary\", summary)\n\n            # Send initial topic cards\n            if _topic_manager:\n                cards = await })\n\n            # Stream events\n            async for event_data in broadcaster.event_generator(connection):\n                yield event_data\n\n        except asyncio.CancelledError:\n            logger.info(f\"SSE stream cancelled for surface {surface_id}\")\n            raise\n\n    return StreamingResponse(\n        event_stream(),\n        media_type=\"text/event-stream\",\n      content={\"error\": \"Feedback processor not initialized\"}\n        )\n\n    # Map string to enum\n    feedback_type_map = {\n        \"self_modification\": FeedbackType.SELF_MODIFICATION,\n        \"component_iteration\": FeedbackType.COMPONENT_ITERATION,\n        \"routing_correction\": FeedbackType.ROUTING_CORRECTION,\n        \"behavior_adjustment\": FeedbackType.BEHAVIOR_ADJUSTMENT,\n    }\n\n    feedback_type = feedback_type_map.get(\n        request.feedback_type,\n        FeedbackType.SELF_MODIFICATION\n    )\n\n    feedback_req = FeedbackRequest(\n        feedback=request.feedback,\n        feedback_type=feedback_type,\n        context=request.context,\n        session_id=request.session_id,\n        require_approval=request.require_approval\n    )\n\n
